fields.summary: Extracting normalize_image_bytes helper for image byte normalization/base64 logic in types.py

content:
type: ANSWER
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: I've already completed my change. normalize_image_bytes(image: bytes) -> tuple[bytes, bytes] is defined at module level before MessageRole; returns (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing) using base64.b64decode(image, validate=True) with except binascii.Error fallback. image_to_base64 now does: if not self.image: return self; then self.image, decoded_for_guessing = normalize_image_bytes(self.image); then if not self.image_mimetype: guess = filetype.guess(decoded_for_guessing); self.image_mimetype = guess.mime if guess else None. Please rebase your get_image_mimetype on top of this shape - feel free to call normalize_image_bytes or refactor the mimetype-guessing line into your own method, just keep the two-step normalize-then-guess flow intact.

fields.summary: I've already completed my change. normalize_image_bytes(image: bytes) -> tuple[bytes, bytes] is defined at module level before MessageRole; returns (encoded_image, decoded_for_guessing) using base64.b64decode(image, validate=True) with except binascii.Error fallback. image_to_base64 now does: if not self.image: return self; then self.image, decoded_for_guessing = normalize_image_bytes(self.image); then if not self.image_mimetype: guess = filetype.guess(decoded_for_guessing); self.image_mimetype = guess.mime if guess else None. Please rebase your get_image_mimetype on top of this shape - feel free to call normalize_image_bytes or refactor the mimetype-guessing line into your own method, just keep the two-step normalize-then-guess flow intact.
